ipAccess.title: IP blacklist, reallow & whitelist
ipAccess.subtitle: View blocks and manage whitelist. Reallow entries cannot be changed from the web app.
ipAccess.devNotice: IP access policy is disabled in development unless IP_ACCESS_FORCE=1 is set on the API server.
ipAccess.loadFailed: Unable to load IP access data.
ipAccess.emptyReallow: No reallowed entries in the database.

blacklist.title: Blacklisted IPs (ephemeral, read-only)
blacklist.description: IPs blocked after a failed login. No actions here — reallow is never done from the app.

reallow.title: Reallowed IPs (persisted, read-only)
reallow.description: These entries bypass the login blacklist even without whitelist-only mode. Audit view only.
reallow.oralOnlyNotice: Add or remove only outside the app: after oral verification (phone), insert the row in the database (Adminer, pgweb, psql). Use canonical CIDR, e.g. 203.0.113.10/32. See server/src/ip-access/README.md.

whitelist.title: Whitelist (persisted, optional lockdown)
whitelist.description: When enabled, only listed CIDRs can reach the API (except /ping and /docs).
